scripts.build: bun run --filter @rbxts/charm-devtools build && bun run --filter charm-devtools-plugin build && bun run --filter charm-devtools-test build
scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --filter @rbxts/charm-devtools watch" "bun run --filter charm-devtools-plugin watch" "bun run --filter charm-devtools-test watch" "bun run --filter charm-devtools-plugin watch:rbxm" "bun run --filter charm-devtools-test serve"
